Character.name: Dr. Anya Volkov (The Architect)
Character.description: Former GRU cyber warfare commander, Dimitri's older sister, recruited Elena's mother in 1999, Kronos founding member and strategic mastermind

Character.name: Irina Kuznetsova (Babushka)
Character.description: Ex-KGB quartermaster, now black market arms dealer at Izmailovsky Market, Dimitri's informant

Location.name: Sheremetyevo Airport, Moscow
Location.description: Moscow's primary international airport, FSB surveillance hub, Elena's arrival point
Location.atmosphere: Sterile, heavily monitored, sub-zero temperatures outside, bureaucratic paranoia inside

Location.name: Izmailovsky Flea Market
Location.description: Sprawling Moscow flea market, Soviet-era contraband hub, black market for quantum-resistant hardware
Location.atmosphere: Chaotic, polyglot, surveillance-heavy, nostalgic Soviet kitsch meets cutting-edge tech smuggling

Location.name: Gorky Park (Winter)
Location.description: Historic Moscow park, frozen in winter, conceals entrance to Cold War bunker beneath fountain
Location.atmosphere: Desolate, frozen, wind-swept, layers of Soviet history buried beneath snow

Location.name: Moscow River Embankment
Location.description: Frozen river embankment, emergency tunnel exit point, three-way siege location
Location.atmosphere: Exposed, frozen, surrounded by hostile forces, ice cracking underfoot

Technology.name: Quantum Fragment Tracker
Technology.description: Entanglement-based tracking device embedded in Kill Switch Fragment, impossible to detect or disable
technical_details: Uses quantum entanglement for position tracking

Location.name: Zamoskvorechye Safe House
Location.description: Elena's temporary Moscow base, overlooking Moskva River, Soviet-era apartment building
Location.atmosphere: Cramped, cold, anonymous, peeling wallpaper and pre-digital security (mechanical locks)
